title: Instrument de ratification du Royaume-Uni
text_preview: WHEREAS an Agreement concerning the International Institute of Refrigeration replacing the Convention of 21st June 1920 as modified on 31st May 1937, was done at Paris on the First day of December, One thousand Nine hundred and Fifty-four, by representatives of the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and of the Governments of certain other Powers and States, Member Countries the In…

pages.text:
WHEREAS

an Agreement concerning the

International

Institute

of Refrigeration

replacing the Convention of 21st June 1920 as modified on 31st May 1937, was done at Paris on the First day of December, One thousand Nine hundred and Fifty-four, by representatives of the Government of the United Kingdom of Great

Britain and Northern Ireland and of

the

Governments of certain other Powers and States,

Member

Countries

the

International

Institute of Refrigeration, which Agreement

is
is, word for word, as follows:-

The Goverrment of the United Kingdom

of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, having considered the Agreement aforesaid,

hereby

confirm and ratify the same and undertake faithfully to perform and carry out all the stipulations therein contained.

In witness whereof this Instrument of

Ratification is signed and sealed by Her

Majesty's Principal Secretary of State for

Foreign Affairs.

Done

Done at London the Iwenty-first day

One thousand

Nine hundred and

of June,

Sixty-two.

Hame
